Generative AI: computer systems that can copy intelligent human behaviour and produce new content, especially text or images
Large Language Models: a computer program that uses very large collections of language data in order to understand and produce text in a way that is similar to the way humans do
Neural Network: a computer system which is designed to work in a similar way to the human brain and nervous system
Parameters: something that decides or limits the way in which something can be done
Training: the process of learning the skills that you need to do a job
Fine-tuning: the action of making very small changes to something so that it is as good as it can possibly be
API: a set of programming tools that enables a program to communicate with another program or an operating system
Autonomous: able to do things and make decisions without help from anyone else
